---
<<<<<<< Updated upstream
title: "Publications"
=======
title: "publication"
>>>>>>> Stashed changes
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    highlight: tango
---

[Assessing the relationship between city growth and electricity use over time: A comparative analysis of Chandigarh and Seattle](https://digital.lib.washington.edu/researchworks/handle/1773/26844), University of Washington, 2014


[Public Street and Area Lighting Inventory Phase 1: Survey Results](http://www.pnnl.gov/main/publications/external/technical_reports/PNNL-23723.pdf), Municipal Solid-State Street Lighting Consortium, Prepared for U.S. Department of Energy, 2014
